title: PatternProviderSave
description: Preserves all items stored in the Pattern Provider when the block is broken.
body:
**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1409613/description_171fea5e-0eb9-45f5-abb8-a64567409753.gif)**

**Introduction:**  
This mod modifies the Pattern Provider, allowing it to retain stored patterns when broken and picked up.

| Mod Name                    |Supported |
| --------------------------- |--------- |
| Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) |✅ Yes     |
| ExtendedAE                  |✅ Yes     |
| AdvanceAE                   |✅ Yes     |
| MEGA                        |✅ Yes     |
| Crazy AE2 Addons            |❌ No      |
| More AE2 Addions            |❌ No      |
